name: Fresh Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and remove any bruised leaves or thick stems. Shake off excess water from the leaves.
2. Place the spinach in a 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
3. Heat, covered tightly, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes. Stir after 2 minutes.
4. Drain any excess water and season to taste.
